title: Laelia kautskyana

This orchid is native to Central and South America, and its classification is part of the subtribe Laeliinae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The subtribe Laeliinae is further divided into several genera, and Laelia kautskyana belongs to one of these genera. The classification of Laelia kautskyana is a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to revision as new information becomes available.
